markets.question: Spread: Boyacá Chicó FC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Colombia Primera A game, scheduled for March 28 at 5:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Boyacá Chicó FC" if Boyacá Chicó FC win the game by 3 or more goals.
